authentication.method: API key via header or query parameter
authentication.note: Add this secret to your GitHub repo or org settings. The value is provided by the style.md service admin.

description: SVG banner and icon generation API for the style.md industrial monospace design system.

params.icon: Remix icon name for icon mode (use ?type=icons to list)
params.label: Text label for text mode (e.g. 'St')

icons.description: List all available remix icon names

github_action.description: Add this workflow to any repo to auto-generate a banner on push to main. It reads the version from the latest git tag and commits a fresh .github/banner.svg.
github_action.setup: 1. Add org secret STYLEMD_API_KEY at https://github.com/organizations/readmedotmd/settings/secrets/actions 2. Add org variable STYLEMD_GENERATE_URL (the DO function base URL) at https://github.com/organizations/readmedotmd/settings/variables/actions 3. Copy the workflow YAML into .github/workflows/generate-banner.yml in each repo.
github_action.workflow:
name: Generate Banner

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  banner:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Get version from latest tag
        id: version
        run: |
          TAG=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0")
          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Get repo metadata
        id: meta
        run: |
          REPO_NAME=$(basename "$GITHUB_REPOSITORY")
          REPO_DESC=$(gh repo view "$GITHUB_REPOSITORY" --json description -q .description 2>/dev/null || echo "")
          echo "name=$REPO_NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "desc=$REPO_DESC" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}

      - name: Generate banner SVG
        run: |
          mkdir -p .github
          curl -sfG -o .github/banner.svg \
            -H "X-API-Key: $STYLEMD_API_KEY" \
            --data-urlencode "type=banner" \
            --data-urlencode "name=$REPO_NAME" \
            --data-urlencode "version=$VERSION" \
            --data-urlencode "desc=$REPO_DESC" \
            "$GENERATE_URL"
        env:
          STYLEMD_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.STYLEMD_API_KEY }}
          GENERATE_URL: ${{ vars.STYLEMD_GENERATE_URL }}
          REPO_NAME: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.name }}
          VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}
          REPO_DESC: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.desc }}

      - name: Commit banner
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add .github/banner.svg
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" && exit 0
          git commit -m "chore: update banner to $VERSION"
          git push
        env:
          VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}
